source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Instrument Sans or Inter for refined publishing UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese editorial labels, tabular metrics, elegant display headings, and calm multilingual hierarchy.
layout: Precise 8px grid, 8px radii, lace-net dividers, olive cap contour accents, humid green separators, compact editorial navigation, high-signal publishing dashboards, and soft forest-ink shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent Veiled Lady motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated veiled lady fungus for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: Veiled lady fungus (Phallus indusiatus) with accurate fungal form: a slender white stem, delicate white lace indusium skirt hanging in a netted veil, olive-brown cap with subtle wet gleba sheen, humid tropical-forest green undertones reflected softly in shadows, fine natural mushroom texture, crisp silhouette edges. Include one elegant full fruiting body with the cap, stem, and entire lace veil visible.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the cap, lace veil, or stem; keep the veil fully separated from the background.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white lace detail, olive cap texture, humid green tonal influence, and natural fungal delicacy.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no leaves, no moss, no soil, no second species, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Veiled Lady" / "Veiled Lady" derived from the visible veiled lady fungus motif cutout.
Reference use: Use the visible mushroom image in this conversation as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the white lace indusium, olive-brown cap, cream-white stem, humid tropical-forest green tonal context, translucent net pattern, and wet gleba highlights. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals visible in the fungus and humid forest context.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 if available, clean product design-system reference sheet.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, generous whitespace, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Veiled Lady", motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data publishing analytics, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Typography: English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with short examples; use refined editorial sans plus readable Japanese UI guidance, clear numeric alignment, elegant publishing system hierarchy.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible elegant publishing product system, precise grid, crisp UI mockup, quiet editorial workflow, 8px radii everywhere, subtle lace-net divider texture, olive cap contour rhythm, humid green separators, cream paper-like surfaces.
Color palette: lace white and spore cream backgrounds, deep forest ink, olive cap primary, humid green secondary, porcelain lace accent, pale veil highlight, mushroom stem ivory, damp moss-muted support, soft olive-brown warning/destructive derived from cap shadow. No unrelated colors.
UI coverage details: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, publishing dashboard chart cards, KPI cards, editorial queue cards, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow token swatches.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no bright blue accents, no red/orange/yellow accents except tiny warning/destructive states derived from muted olive-brown cap shadow, no random brand names, no watermark, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock website hero layout.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Veiled Lady" / "Veiled Lady". It must feel like the same elegant publishing system translated from the visible light board, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible veiled lady fungus motif and the visible light-mode design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, lace-net texture, olive cap contour rhythm, humid forest separators, 8px radii, editorial publishing layout, component language, spacing, and typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 if available, clean product design-system reference sheet.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, generous whitespace, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Veiled Lady", Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data publishing analytics, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest tropical forest ink and olive cap shadow; text from lace white, porcelain veil, and spore cream highlights; olive cap primary, humid green secondary, porcelain lace accent, moss-muted support, translucent border lines, restrained warning/destructive from muted olive-brown cap shadow only. Use subtle lace-net divider texture and olive cap wet contour swatches inside token areas.
UI coverage details: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, publishing dashboard chart cards, KPI cards, editorial queue cards, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow token swatches.
Typography: English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with short examples; refined editorial sans plus readable Japanese UI guidance, clear numeric alignment.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible elegant publishing product system, precise grid, crisp dark UI mockup, refined editorial workflow, 8px radii everywhere.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple gradients, no bright blue accents, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no stock website hero layout.
